Effective Date: February 15, 2026

We collect device identifiers, approximate location, browsing activity, and ad interaction data to measure advertising performance and personalize ads where permitted by user choices.

We do not use precise location for advertising audiences. Users can opt out of sale, sharing, cross-context behavioral advertising, and targeted advertising.

When a user opts out, we do not disclose device identifiers or browsing activity to advertising partners for targeted advertising.
